title: Zwaluw's Projectiles
description: A pack which overhauls the projectiles!
body:
## Welcome!
I've always liked texture packs which just are add-ons for default, this way you could technically make your own texture pack! This pack is no exception!



## What is it?
Zwaluws Better Projectiles changes the textures of:
The arrows,
The bow,
The crossbow,
The fishing rods.
The snowballs and
The eggs!

![Zwaluw's Projectiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/21hW1Wjs/images/bf81a322e55ff596856644e3c28ba0adf8d4f4ab.png 'What this pack changes!')
